message:
fix(receipt): overhaul content-hash pipeline with length-prefixed typed helpers and fail-closed chain integrity

Replace ad-hoc hasher.update() calls across ProofEvidence, AppliedRuleRecord,
ReceiptVerdict, TranslationValidationReceipt, FailureReceipt, and FailureKind
with typed helper functions (hash_str, hash_bytes, hash_u64, hash_i64,
hash_bool, hash_content_hash, hash_len, hash_pack_version, hash_rewrite_category)
that include length-prefixing to prevent hash collisions between adjacent fields.

Both TranslationValidationReceipt::new and FailureReceipt::new now self-compute
their content_hash via expected_content_hash(), eliminating the old separate
compute_hash method. record_failure changes from -> () to -> Result and now
pre-validates chain integrity and the failure's own content hash before accepting.
ValidationReceiptEmitter::emit gates all verdict branches on a chain integrity
check, returning EmitResult::Quarantined on any chain corruption (fail-closed).

New ReceiptChainError variants: ReceiptContentHashMismatch and
FailureContentHashMismatch. Tests cover tampered body, chain corruption
quarantine, hash sensitivity to cost-model-id, rule pack metadata/version,
rule category/soundness, and verdict evidence contents.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
